response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep technical breadth across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent tooling, with clear ownership and operational experience — aligning well with the role’s core demands. His hands-on work with AI infrastructure at re:cinq and prior high-scale systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby) directly matches must-haves. His agile, CI/CD, and stakeholder experience is strong, though limited explicit exposure to LLM-driven code generation and Python depth are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq
Extensive background in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Strong operational ownership, CI/CD, and agile practices across multiple roles
concerns: Python expertise not explicitly highlighted despite being a must-have
Limited evidence of direct LLM/ML product experience or AI-native engineering environments
German language proficiency is basic, which may hinder local stakeholder alignment
